title: Cyberpack (Thermal katana)
description: CIT resource pack that adds a bunch of cyberpunk weapons and tools to Minecraft!
body:
Cyberpack

![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G3j047V9/images/6abeaecd3e327dcb965a0a484376996f63714422.png) **To obtain, rename the required item in an anvil using a name from the model list. If the model does not appear, check that the name is correct and that the resource pack is enabled.**
All Renames ``` Version 2.8 - (sword) Errata / Thermal Katana - (sword) Jinchu-Maru - (sword) Hatred - (spear) Fang - (mace) Sasquatch's Hammer - (pickaxe) Arcanedge - (pickaxe) Titanic Red - (axe) Data Reaper - (axe) Hatred - (axe) Tomahawk - (shovel) Techno Spade - (shovel) Caretaker's Spade - (bow) Archangel ```
![renames list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G3j047V9/images/2abd6d3d34825ac04d00bbda7a5a4266c36d82c6.png) ## **If you are playing on a version lower than 1.21.5:** **The pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)** **If you're playing on Fabric, this pack requires [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** ![thermal katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G3j047V9/images/d07c95959831baac06b0150db46d8df7f40be072.png) ![new first person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G3j047V9/images/cad72b2693f19c8a8b032fd9146bb2b45228bcde.png) # **Social**

# **Support the project**
